hero.description: AQVO is the first brand in Uzbekistan to embody quality and honesty, presenting jiz products with a new taste and modern design.

sectionOne.slide1_desc: Aqvo is a brand that embodies quality and honesty, presenting its products with a new taste and modern design through an innovative approach. Being the first in Uzbekistan to launch the production of jiz products based on high quality and halal principles, Aqvo continues to win the trust of customers.
sectionOne.slide2_desc: The Aqvo brand currently serves consumers with beef, chicken, and mutton products. Each of our products is manufactured on the basis of unique high quality, new taste, and honesty principles. Aqvo is a bright symbol of delicious and reliable products.
sectionOne.slide3_desc: The Aqvo brand organizes the delivery of its products to wide regions, putting quality and speed first. Through our delivery network, products reach all regions of Uzbekistan on time. Aqvo – always close to you, always reliable.

sectionThree.three-title: Experience a new taste with AQVO.
sectionThree.three-text: The Aqvo brand invites you to discover new tastes. Our products offer every consumer a new, unique experience through a high-quality and innovative approach. Aqvo is not just a taste, but an opportunity to enjoy a new experience with high-quality and halal products. Discover the new taste with us and feel the true quality!
